mapper.select: select plugin_id, plugin_key, name, version, description, author, is_enabled, installed_at, enabled_at, manifest from plugin where 1=1 and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%') order by installed_at desc
select plugin_id, plugin_key, name, version, description, author, is_enabled, installed_at, enabled_at, manifest from plugin where plugin_id = #{pluginId}
select plugin_id, plugin_key, name, version, description, author, is_enabled, installed_at, enabled_at, manifest from plugin where plugin_key = #{pluginKey}
select plugin_id, plugin_key, name, version, description, author, is_enabled, installed_at, enabled_at, manifest from plugin where is_enabled = 1 order by installed_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into plugin (plugin_key, name, version, description, author, is_enabled, installed_at, manifest) values (#{pluginKey}, #{name}, #{version}, #{description}, #{author}, #{isEnabled}, #{installedAt}, #{manifest})
mapper.update: update plugin set name=#{name}, version=#{version}, description=#{description}, is_enabled=#{isEnabled}, enabled_at=#{enabledAt}, manifest=#{manifest} where plugin_id = #{pluginId}
